title: EfficientNet
summary: A family of neural network architectures designed for efficient image classification. It sits inside Neural Networks / Model Architectures. Compare it with ℓ2 Regularization and ℓ1 Regularization. It opens into EfficientNet-B0 and EfficientNet-B1.

blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is
panels.body: A family of neural network architectures designed for efficient image classification.

panels.label: What it is not
panels.body: It is not just ℓ2 Regularization and ℓ1 Regularization; the graph shows how it sits inside Neural Networks.

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask whether the term changes layers, activations, gradients, optimization, or training dynamics. Compare it against ℓ2 Regularization and ℓ1 Regularization so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.

panels.label: Best next step
